Container.Name: readwise-remarkable
Container.Overview: Sync Readwise Reader to reMarkable with auto-cleanup, highlight sync, and web UI for settings and rmapi auth.
Container.Description: Syncs Readwise Reader articles to reMarkable tablet. Unseen documents get uploaded as EPUBs/PDFs. Archived or seen items are automatically removed. Highlights on reMarkable sync back to Readwise. Web UI for settings and rmapi authentication.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the settings web UI

Config.Name: Readwise Token
Config.Description: Your Readwise access token from https://readwise.io/access_token (can also be set via web UI)

Config.Name: reMarkable Folder
Config.Description: Folder on reMarkable where documents are uploaded

Config.Name: Sync Tag
Config.Description: Tag to filter by (* for all documents)

Config.Name: Economist Enabled
Config.Description: Enable weekly Economist PDF sync via Readwise

Config.Name: Highlight Sync
Config.Description: Sync highlights from reMarkable back to Readwise

Config.Name: Persistent Data
Config.Description: Stores rmapi auth, settings, and export tracker
